content.body_text:
# Networking::ARP::NDPEntry

 **Introduced** : BIG-IP_v9.0

 A struct that describes an dynamic NDP entry/statistics.

        **Member** | **Type** | **Description**
 ndp_address | String | The NDP entry’s IP address.
 mac_address | String | The netmask of the destination.
 vlan | String | The VLAN name for the destination.
 expiration | long | The MTU to destination.
 is_router | boolean | The flag indicating whether this entry is acting as a router.
 state | [NDPState](https://clouddocs.f5.com/api/icontrol-soap/Networking__ARP__NDPState.html) | The flag indicating the state of this entry.

 ## See Also

 [iControl](https://clouddocs.f5.com/api/icontrol-soap/APIReference.html) ::

 [iControl](https://clouddocs.f5.com/api/icontrol-soap/APIReference.html) :: [Networking](https://clouddocs.f5.com/api/icontrol-soap/Networking.html) :: [ARP](https://clouddocs.f5.com/api/icontrol-soap/Networking__ARP.html)
